scope_boundary: Three prospectively versioned sacrificial instruments over eighteen tasks and 36 exact local Qwen3-8B calls repaired terminal eligibility and clean controls but failed the terminal residual-extraction consumer contract; all fifteen held-out tasks remained sealed and no claim attempt occurred.
transition_reason: The terminal v3 instrument reached 6/6 eligibility accuracy, 3/3 clean releases, perfect required-residual recall, and zero false reassurance, but only 3/6 extraction objects met the frozen action/check schema against a 5/6 floor. The no-repair rule made this terminal; heldout outcomes never opened.
required_artifacts: a prospectively new instrument family rather than repair of the closed campaign
schema-admissible residual extraction above the frozen floor
fresh held-out natural tasks and pressure conditions
independently implemented verification and capacity evaluation
complete useful-throughput, latency, cost, safety, and transfer evidence
negative_results: v1 collapsed all five decisions to block and routed exact remediation only 1/5
v2 copied a label-bearing pessimistic exemplar and blocked all clean controls
v3 admitted only 3/6 extraction objects against the frozen 5/6 floor
every v3 defect case emitted undeclared route retain and omitted requested-check IDs
all held-out tasks remained sealed and claim-attempt count stayed zero
downgrade_triggers: any failed instrument version or heldout-sealed fact is removed
sacrificial semantic metrics are described as held-out claim evidence
the terminal no-repair rule is reopened retrospectively
blocks_promotion is relabeled as upward support
chapter-core, publication, or release authority is inferred
promotion_burden: Design a prospectively distinct future campaign with a qualified consumer-complete instrument, fresh hidden natural tasks, stronger and independently implemented evaluators, complete pressure and capacity denominators, joint useful-throughput and risk metrics, and transfer before any residual-honesty or verifier-capacity support review.
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; no external human review requested or claimed
non_claims: does not establish residual honesty under pressure
does not establish verifier competence, useful throughput, safety, or transfer
does not promote any chapter core claim above argument
does not establish SOTA, AGI, or ASI
